IT Support • Xestro Support • Paper-to-Digital
Purple Vector Operations
Get in touch

About

Local support for clinics that want their systems to stop fighting back.

Purple Vector Operations provides practical, non-clinical support for medical practices and individual clinicians across Tasmania. Services include practice administration support, Xestro assistance, workflow optimisation, paper-to-digital medical records conversion, and secure data handling. PVO works alongside existing staff and IT providers to reduce admin load, clean up legacy systems, and keep clinic operations running smoothly.

What we’re good at
  • Clinic-first IT support (remote + on-site when needed)
  • Xestro templates, workflows, recalls, billing, reporting
  • Secure scanning, conversion, and document organisation
  • Automation to remove repetitive admin tasks
How we work
  • Clear scope, plain-English updates, no mystery invoices
  • Security-minded by default (least privilege, backups, audit trails)
  • Documentation so you are not locked-in to tribal knowledge
  • Retainers available for predictable support and ongoing improvements

Services

Practical IT + clinic workflow support, minus the drama.

Managed IT Support

Retainer-based remote support, maintenance, monitoring, and quick help when things break (they will).

Popular
  • Remote support retainer (Lite) from $50/wk
  • Patch + maintenance windows from $60/m
  • User + device onboarding from $120

Xestro Support

Templates, recalls, billing workflows, reporting, user access, and training to make Xestro behave.

Popular
  • Template & label pack from $50/m
  • Recall clean-up & rebuild from $180
  • Billing workflow tune-up from $220

Paper-to-Digital

Secure scanning and conversion to searchable PDFs, with sensible naming and folder structures.

Popular
  • Scan + OCR to searchable PDF from $0.25/page
  • Folder + naming structure setup from $120
  • Bulk file clean-up from $180

Automation Services

Cut the repetitive stuff. Automations for reminders, reporting, document flows, and “why do we do this?” tasks.

Popular
  • Automation maintenance pack (monthly) $120–$180/m
  • Operational analytics reporting (monthly) $320–$1200/m
  • AI drafting pack (monthly) $110/m

Hardware Maintenance

The unglamorous but essential stuff: server cupboards, printers, UPS checks, cabling, and keeping equipment sane.

Popular
  • Server cupboard / equipment check $90/m
  • Active backup monitoring $10/wk
  • Device & asset register upkeep $15/wk

Admin Support

Clinic admin help without the “have you tried turning it off and on?” energy. Training, setup, and tidy processes.

Popular
  • Admin workflow optimisation $180
  • Staff onboarding & training $150
  • Patient comms pack (SMS/Email) $60/m
  • Appointment booking optimisation $120
  • Document + form library setup $60/m

Hover over a service title to see popular inclusions and price ranges.

Xestro Support

Practical Xestro help for busy clinics.

Purple Vector Operations helps clinics and clinicians get more out of Xestro with practical support around setup, templates, recalls, billing workflows, reporting, user access, and historical records handling.

Templates and structure

Create, clean up, and standardise templates, labels, forms, and record structure so staff are not reinventing the wheel every Tuesday.

Recalls and workflows

Review recalls, follow-up processes, and internal task flow so things stop slipping into the void or getting handled six different ways.

Billing support

Tune billing-related workflows, reduce admin friction, and improve consistency around the parts staff usually hate touching.

Common Xestro support areas

  • Templates, labels, and document structure
  • Recalls, follow-up workflows, and task cleanup
  • Billing workflows and administrative consistency
  • Reporting support and system tidy-ups
  • User access, permissions, and staff guidance
  • Historical records access and legacy workflow support

What this is not

  • Clinical advice or treatment support
  • Vendor-authoritative product documentation
  • Full replacement of your IT provider or software vendor
  • Magic. Sadly.

Process

Clear enough to be reassuring. Flexible enough to survive reality.

  • Step 1

    Initial review

    Understand the current setup

    Review the practice's software, workflows, pain points, admin load, record handling, access issues, and operational priorities before recommending any work.

  • Step 2

    Scope and structure

    Choose the right engagement model

    Work may be structured as an ongoing retainer, a one-off project, a digitisation program, or targeted support depending on what the clinic actually needs.

  • Step 3

    Implement and tidy

    Fix the operational mess

    This can include workflow cleanup, Xestro support, template preparation, document organisation, scanning, automation, and practical support that staff can realistically maintain.

  • Step 4

    Deliver and document

    Leave things usable

    Changes, files, and processes are documented clearly so the clinic is not left relying on mystery knowledge or improvised fixes.

  • Step 5

    Ongoing support

    Keep improving what matters

    For retained clients, support continues through routine checks, problem-solving, incremental improvements, and practical help as the clinic changes.

  • Built
    For
    Clinics

FAQ

The obvious questions clinics ask first.

Does PVO provide clinical advice?

No. PVO is strictly non-clinical and does not provide diagnosis, treatment, clinical judgment, triage, or medico-legal advice.

What kinds of clinics are a good fit?

Specialist private practices, individual clinicians, rooms with workflow or admin issues, clinics using Xestro, and practices dealing with legacy paper record backlogs.

Do you replace our existing IT provider?

No. PVO works alongside existing IT providers where needed. The role is practical operational support, not pretending to absorb every backend system responsibility on earth.

Can you help with Xestro?

Yes. Support can include setup help, workflow optimisation, template support, historical records access support, and practical troubleshooting around day-to-day clinic use.

Can you scan paper records into digital files?

Yes. PVO can handle structured paper-to-digital conversion with OCR, file naming, folder organisation, optional upload support, and secure return methods.

How are services priced?

Support can be structured as retainers, one-off projects, digitisation programs, and add-on services depending on scope, workload, and the clinic's environment.

Contact
